name: Muspell
short_description: Muspell is a fantasy sandbox where you build your fortress and fight monsters in an infinite procedural world made of blocks. Collect loot and improve your base to unlock better equipment from random daily merchants.
detailed_description:
Gameplay

Muspell is a fantasy sandbox where you build your fortress and fight monsters in an infinite procedural world made of blocks. Collect loot and improve your base to increase your score and unlock better stuff from random daily merchants.

  • Gather, Fight and Build to increase your score and unlock better props.

  • A merchant will spawn every morning with random stuff.

  • Monsters get tougher as you get deep and/or far from your spawn point.

  • The goal is to reach the highest score and tier in as few days as possible.

Features

  • 40+ Items and props (more planned).

  • 20+ different blocks (more planned).

  • Network Multiplayer with self-hosted server. We don’t host anything.

  • Local multiplayer in split screen mode.

  • Low poly and pixel art aesthetics.

  • Python Scripting.
